MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-23-2018 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jul-24-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of And Motion To Deem Facts As Admitted
Off Calendar Mar-06-2018 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Robert Schoen, Esq. of Legal Assistance to the Elderly, Inc., Tel. No. 415.538.3333, appearing for the Defendant Merle Woo;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

Defense counsel stipulates that the matter may be heard by Judge Pro Tem Anne Hipshman.

Matter called, Mr. Schoen addresses the Court. Judge Pro Tem Hipshman addresses the error in the tentative ruling re: "Defendant's" in the two first sentences, that should read as "Plaintiff's". Mr. Schoen provides the proof as requested in the Court's tentative ruling in open court. Mr. Schoen stated that he called opposing counsel yesterday to give notice of his intention to appear today, that there was no response, and that he did leave a message.

Ruling: At the conclusion of argument/proof submitted by Mr. Schoen, the Court finds it has the authority to/and grants the relief sought by Ms. Woo. The responses filed on February 12th are allowed. Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank's Motion To Deem Facts As Admitted is Denied. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Anne Hipshman, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Matter Not Reported. =(302/JPT/HEK)
